days.title: Introduction to Python OOPs
objectives: Understand the concept of classes and objects in Python
resources: Python Official Documentation - Classes and Objects
tasks: Create an instance of the class and call methods

days.title: Inheritance and Polymorphism
tasks: Create a child class that inherits from a parent class

days.title: Advanced OOPS Concepts
objectives: Understand the concept of multiple inheritance
resources: Tutorialspoint - Encapsulation and Abstraction in Python
tasks: Write a class that uses multiple inheritance
Implement an abstract base class and concrete subclasses

days.title: Python Decorators and Magic Methods
objectives: Understand the concept of decorators in Python
tasks: Implement a magic method for custom behavior

days.title: Project: Design a Simple Game using Python OOPs
objectives: Design and implement a simple game using classes and objects in Python
Implement game logic using inheritance and polymorphism
tasks: Implement the game and test it
